sections.paragraph:
πύον, ου, τό (cp. πύθομαι ‘decay’; Hippocr. et al.; Antig. Car. 117) pus ApcPt 16:31.—DELG s.v. πύθομαι.

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ApcPt ApcPt = Apocalypse of Peter—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 898
